name: Virat Kohli
description: Virat Kohli is an Indian international cricketer and former captain of India. Known for consistency and aggressive batting.

name: Steve Smith
description: Steve Smith is an Australian top-order batter known for his unorthodox technique and high Test average.

name: Ben Stokes
description: Ben Stokes is an English all-rounder known for match-winning performances in ICC events.

name: Jasprit Bumrah
description: Jasprit Bumrah is India's premier fast bowler known for yorkers and death bowling skills.

name: Rohit Sharma
description: Rohit Sharma is an Indian opener known for elegant stroke play and multiple double centuries in ODIs.

name: KL Rahul
description: KL Rahul is a stylish Indian batter capable of playing across all formats.

name: Hardik Pandya
description: Hardik Pandya is an Indian fast-bowling all-rounder known for explosive batting.

name: MS Dhoni
description: MS Dhoni is one of the greatest captains in cricket history and a legendary finisher.

name: Shubman Gill
description: Shubman Gill is a young Indian opener known for elegant batting technique.

name: Joe Root
description: Joe Root is an English batter famous for consistency in Test cricket.

name: Jos Buttler
description: Jos Buttler is an explosive English white-ball batter and wicketkeeper.

name: Kane Williamson
description: Kane Williamson is known for calm leadership and technically sound batting.

name: Trent Boult
description: Trent Boult is a left-arm pacer known for swing bowling.

name: Babar Azam
description: Babar Azam is Pakistan's premier batter with excellent consistency.

name: Shaheen Afridi
description: Shaheen Afridi is a left-arm fast bowler known for pace and swing.

name: David Warner
description: David Warner is an aggressive Australian opener across formats.

name: Pat Cummins
description: Pat Cummins is Australia's fast bowler and captain.

name: Glenn Maxwell
description: Glenn Maxwell is famous for innovative and explosive batting.

name: Rashid Khan
description: Rashid Khan is one of the world's best T20 leg spinners.

name: Mohammad Nabi
description: Mohammad Nabi is an experienced Afghan all-rounder.

name: Quinton de Kock
description: Quinton de Kock is a destructive South African opener and wicketkeeper.

name: Kagiso Rabada
description: Kagiso Rabada is a fast bowler known for pace and aggression.

description: Marnus Labuschagne is a top-ranked Australian Test batter.
